description_long: This object depicts a compact internet cafe setup featuring a long, light wood desk with three computer stations arranged side by side. Each station is equipped with a flat-screen monitor, keyboard, mouse, and a black office chair with armrests and a five-point base. The desk surface also holds small personal items such as water bottles and cups, adding a touch of realism and daily use. The back of the desk is solid and extends upward, providing privacy and separation from the rear. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for a shared workspace or public computer area. The materials and layout suggest a clean, organized environment typical of urban internet cafes.
description: A modern internet cafe setup with three computer stations, black office chairs, and a light wood desk, arranged for shared public use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three computer stations, monitors, keyboards, mice, and black office chairs aligned at a long wooden desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the arrangement of the chairs, and the placement of monitors and accessories.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back panel of the desk and the tops of the chairs, with no computer screens visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the desk, chairs, and computer stations.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Three computer stations are clearly visible, arranged side by side with monitors, keyboards, mice, and chairs.
